info.title: SCP Knowledge Graph Layer
info.description:
Semantic understanding layer — transforms SCP Memory Core memories into structured, trustworthy, versioned knowledge.

**Auth:** Pass your API key in the `X-Api-Key` header. Keys are configured via the `API_KEYS` environment variable. Omit the variable to disable auth in development.

**Rate limit:** 100 requests per 60 seconds per API key.

schema.title: Response List Entities V1 Entities  Get
Response Search Entities V1 Entities Search  Get
Response List Relationships V1 Relationships  Get
Response Get Outbound V1 Relationships Outbound  Entity Id  Get
Response Get Inbound V1 Relationships Inbound  Entity Id  Get
Response Get Evidence For Subject V1 Evidence Subject  Subject Id  Get
Response Check Idempotency V1 Evidence Check Idempotency  Get

post.description:
Ingest a single SCP Memory Core record.

Idempotent: re-submitting the same record.id returns status=SKIPPED_DUPLICATE.
